The player moved RIGHT action extended the gray trail to the right. The player didn't move. The trail extended to the right. So RIGHT extends the trail but doesn't move the player. The player stays at the same position. The trail is getting longer. This is like a "painting" or "drawing" mechanic. The player is painting a trail.
Let me check the player position and think about what the goal is the goal. The bottom bar shows: Magenta, Red, Green, Blue. Green, Blue. This is the target order. The colored blocks on the right are: Red, Blue, Green. Blue, Green (top to bottom).
Maybe I need to move the player to the colored blocks in a specific order and pick them up? Or maybe the trail needs to connect to the colored blocks? Let me try moving UP more to reach the red block, then RIGHT to reach the red block.

</parameter>
